channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: About Myself
item.description: Introduction A hardworking, passionate, confident and highly motivated individual with a keen interest in field of VLSI, Embedded Systems or anything Electronics. Always open to learning and enhancing my knowledge. I aim to upskill myself and deepen my overall understanding. During my course at college, I have completed various projects whilch I’ll write about later. Visit my Github repository!

item.title: EEPROM AT28C16
item.description: AT28C16 The AT28C16 is a low-power, high-performance Electrically Erasable and Programmable Read Only Memory with easy to use features. The AT28C16 is a 16K memory organized as 2,048 words by 8 bits. The device is manufactured with Atmel’s reliable nonvolatile CMOS technology. Visit my Github repository!
